entry.title: New: RES25-067 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES VALUED AT $4,000 TO THE CITY FROM THE FRESH WATER INITIATIVE, HAWAIʻI COMMUNITY FOUNDATION FOR A STAFF MEMBER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF FACILITY MAINTENANCE TO ATTEND THE 2025 ANNUAL GRANTS MANAGEMENT TRAINING IN WASHINGTON D.C., MARCH 12-14, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
